description: Configure advanced shipping rules for the store by creating and assigning shipping classes. Create a "Bulky Items" shipping class (slug: bulky-items, description: "Large or heavy items requiring special shipping handling") and a "Fragile" shipping class (slug: fragile, description: "Delicate items requiring careful packaging"). For the Domestic shipping zone, configure the Flat rate shipping class costs as follows: $15.00 for Bulky Items, $8.00 for Fragile, and $5.00 for no shipping class. Assign the "Fragile" class to the "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones" (SKU: WBH-001) and the "Bulky Items" class to the "Merino Wool Sweater" (SKU: MWS-GRY-L).
